**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** execution_velocity
**Subcategory:** ruthless_prioritization

## Core Principles
Say no to good ideas to focus on great ones

## Application
Limit WIP, focus intensely, kill projects, protect focus, choose few bets
